purpose: Define the static ready gate policy for derived static-repaired direct repair rows.

gate_policy.critical_boundary: This gate does not itself allow eval, checkpoint read, training, export, benchmark, or promotion.

required_preconditions.name: original_manifest_unchanged
required_preconditions.criterion: Original normalization/review/manifest artifacts must remain unmodified.

required_preconditions.name: row_identity_explicit
required_preconditions.criterion: Row must carry repair_queue_id, source_manifest_row_id, source_eval_manifest_id, source_adapter_kind, and source_path.

required_preconditions.name: source_path_tracked_and_exists
required_preconditions.criterion: source_path_exists must be 1 and source_path must point to a tracked static artifact.

required_preconditions.name: provenance_clean
required_preconditions.criterion: provenance_status must remain CLEAN_HELDOUT_OR_DIRECT_SOURCE or another explicitly reviewed clean provenance label.

required_preconditions.name: schema_review_resolved
required_preconditions.criterion: schema_status must be resolved from HAS_CONTEXT_BUT_NEEDS_REVIEW to an explicitly accepted static schema status in a later branch.

required_preconditions.name: manual_review_resolved
required_preconditions.criterion: repair_review_decision must be resolved from REPAIR_ROW_MANUAL_REVIEW to an explicit accepted decision in a later branch.

required_preconditions.name: permission_boundary_preserved
required_preconditions.criterion: eval_allowed_now, checkpoint_read_allowed_now, training_allowed_now, and promotion_allowed_now must remain 0 until a separate explicit planning branch.
